The CDO leads the full development function, which at this org size typically means major gifts, institutional grants, corporate partnerships, and planned giving. Anthony's proof points in institutional funding strategy, federal grant execution ($500K FTA grant), and nonprofit executive leadership (G1VE Atlanta ED) are genuine assets, but the CDO function at a $27M organization will heavily weight major gifts portfolio ownership and an established donor network — his documented gap.
